sentences.target: Ich hole mein Velo aus dem Keller.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhoːlə maɪ̯n ˈveːlo aʊ̯s deːm ˈkɛlɐ/

translations.de: Ich hole mein Velo aus dem Keller.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhoːlə maɪ̯n ˈveːlo aʊ̯s deːm ˈkɛlɐ/
translations.en: I'm getting my bike from the basement.
translations.es: Estoy sacando mi bici del sótano.
translations.fr: Je sors mon vélo de la cave.
translations.it: Tiro fuori la bici dalla cantina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在从地下室把自行车拿出来。
translations.yue: 我喺地庫攞架單車出嚟。
translations.pt: Estou tirando minha bicicleta do porão.
translations.vi: Tôi đang lấy xe đạp từ tầng hầm.
translations.nl: Ik haal mijn fiets uit de kelder.
translations.hi: मैं तहखाने से अपनी साइकिल निकाल रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βγάζω το ποδήλατό μου από το υπόγειο.
translations.nb: Jeg henter sykkelen min fra kjelleren.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengambil sepeda dari ruang bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Jag hämtar min cykel från källaren.
translations.da: Jeg henter min cykel fra kælderen.
translations.ja: 地下室から自転車を出している。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Velo'; agrees with a neuter noun in accusative singular (no ending).
Common noun (neuter); direct object of 'hole' in accusative; Swiss term for bicycle.
Preposition governing the dative; marks source/origin.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; required by the preposition 'aus' and modifies 'Keller'.
Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'aus' in dative.

sentences.target: Sie fährt mit dem Velo zur Arbeit.
sentences.reading: /ziː fɛːɐ̯t mɪt deːm ˈveːlo tsuːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Sie fährt mit dem Velo zur Arbeit.
translations.ipa: /ziː fɛːɐ̯t mɪt deːm ˈveːlo tsuːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/
translations.fr: Elle va au travail à vélo.
translations.ru: Она едет на работу на велосипеде.
translations.pt: Ela vai de bicicleta para o trabalho.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đạp xe đi làm.
translations.nl: Ze gaat met de fiets naar het werk.
translations.uk: Вона їде на роботу на велосипеді.
translations.hi: वह काम पर साइकिल से जा रही है.
translations.ro: Ea merge la serviciu cu bicicleta.
translations.ja: 彼女は自転車で通勤している。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; stem vowel umlaut in this form.
Preposition governing the dative; marks instrument/means here ('with the bike').
Definite article, dative singular neuter; modifies 'Velo' after 'mit'.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'mit' in dative.
Contraction of 'zu der' (preposition + fused definite article, dative feminine); indicates goal/direction.
Common noun (feminine); object of 'zu(r)' in dative, denotes destination.

sentences.target: Morgen putze ich das Velo gründlich.

translations.de: Morgen putze ich das Velo gründlich.
translations.en: Tomorrow I'll clean the bike thoroughly.
translations.es: Mañana limpiaré la bici a fondo.
translations.fr: Demain, je nettoierai le vélo à fond.
translations.it: Domani pulirò la bici per bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天我会把自行车好好擦干净。
translations.yue: 聽日我會好好清潔架單車。
translations.pt: Amanhã vou limpar a bicicleta a fundo.
translations.he: מחר אנקה את האופניים כמו שצריך.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ lau chùi xe đạp thật kỹ.
translations.nl: Morgen maak ik de fiets grundig schoon.
translations.hi: कल मैं साइकिल अच्छी तरह साफ करूँगा.
translations.el: Αύριο θα καθαρίσω καλά το ποδήλατο.
translations.nb: I morgen skal jeg vaske sykkelen skikkelig.
translations.id: Besok saya akan membersihkan sepeda sampai bersih.
translations.sv: I morgon ska jag rengöra cykeln ordentligt.
translations.da: I morgen skal jeg rengøre cyklen grundigt.
translations.ja: 明日、自転車を念入りに掃除します。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb marking time.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject appearing after the verb (V2 word order).
Definite article, accusative singular neuter; modifies 'Velo'.
Common noun (neuter); direct object of 'putze' in accusative.
Manner adverb modifying the verb ('clean thoroughly').

sentences.target: Das Velo steht heute im Regen.

translations.de: Das Velo steht heute im Regen.
translations.en: The bike is standing in the rain today.
translations.es: La bici está hoy bajo la lluvia.
translations.fr: Le vélo est sous la pluie aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi la bici è sotto la pioggia.
translations.yue: 今日架單車喺雨中淋緊。
translations.pt: Hoje a bicicleta está na chuva.
translations.vi: Hôm nay xe đạp đang dầm mưa.
translations.nl: De fiets staat vandaag in de regen.
translations.hu: Ma a bicikli kint áll az esőben.
translations.hi: आज साइकिल बारिश में खड़ी है.
translations.el: Σήμερα το ποδήλατο στέκεται στη βροχή.
translations.nb: Sykkelen står i regnet i dag.
translations.da: Cyklen står i regnen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は自転車が雨に打たれている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; modifies 'Velo' as subject.
Common noun (neuter); subject of the clause in nominative.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes a stationary location.
Temporal adverb.
Contraction of 'in dem' (preposition + fused definite article, dative masculine); marks location.
Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'in(m)' in dative ('in the rain').

Das Velo steht heute im Regen.
